_publications._publicationTitle: Unraveling the development of cutaneous neurofibromas in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Despite this excess of mutant nmSCs, none of the Nf1-KO mice developed cNFs prior to 1 year of age in the absence of trauma
details: None of the Nf1-KO mice developed cutaneous neurofibromas prior to 1 year of age in the absence of trauma
